My First Post

Published on January 13, 2026 by CP

Welcome to my new website and my first blog post. If you're reading this, you're probably a friend or someone in my circle. I don't really expect or want this to get much traction. that would lowkey suck if i became a celebrity one day and get bashed online some day for some racist homophobic post i made on a blog at 16. Anyway, I made this website because I've always wanted to have one but never committed to it. Seeing as I've had so much time this summer going into junior year, I knew it was the perfect oppurtunity. I'd say it was an oppurtunity well spent. I learned how to code html, css, and some other stuff with a few youtube videos, library books, and some help from Chatgpt. The website is far from perfect rn, but I don't really care. I'd like to believe that watching Dog With A Blog when I was in middle school inspired me to make the site, but it probably didn't. I'll probably continue to make blog post from time to time. However, the more I write this post, the more corny this seems. It also doesn't help that I've felt like the biggest chud over the past few days sitting at my desk making this site. The blog section of this site will most likely serve as like some online diary and commentary for my wacky day to day boyhood escapades. For this first post, I'm sure there's some grammatical errors and formatting issues, but I don't really care for this first post. Finally, I'd like to mention that it probably sucks to read this on mobile. It looks better on a computer.

Well.. I'm done for now, so stop reading this. :)

"Poo-tee-weet?"

Back to Blog
